controls.controlText: Use local exhaust ventilation when vapor may be generated
controls.sdsSection: Section 8 - Exposure Controls and Personal Protection
controls.sourceExcerpt: Use local exhaust ventilation when vapor may be generated.

controls.sdsSection: Section 8 - Exposure Controls and Personal Protection

controls.controlText: Wear nitrile gloves when handling the liquid
controls.sdsSection: Section 8 - Exposure Controls and Personal Protection
controls.sourceExcerpt: Wear nitrile gloves when handling the liquid.

controls.controlText: Rinse skin with water for at least 15 minutes after contact
controls.sourceExcerpt: If on skin, take off contaminated clothing immediately and rinse skin with water for at least 15 minutes.

controls.controlText: Store locked up in corrosion-resistant containers
controls.sourceExcerpt: Store locked up in corrosion-resistant containers.

controls.controlText: Wear face shield or tightly fitting safety goggles
controls.sdsSection: Section 8 - Exposure Controls and Personal Protection
controls.sourceExcerpt: Wear face shield or tightly fitting safety goggles.

controls.controlText: Avoid generating dust and ground equipment during transfer
controls.sourceExcerpt: Avoid generating dust. Ground and bond equipment during transfer.

controls.controlText: Wear a P2 particulate respirator when dust control is insufficient
controls.sdsSection: Section 8 - Exposure Controls and Personal Protection
controls.sourceExcerpt: Wear a P2 particulate respirator when dust control is insufficient.

controls.controlText: Avoid high-pressure water streams that may disperse dust
controls.sourceExcerpt: Avoid high-pressure water streams that may disperse dust.

controls.controlText: Use only outdoors or in a well-ventilated area
controls.sdsSection: Section 8 - Exposure Controls and Personal Protection
controls.sourceExcerpt: Use only outdoors or in a well-ventilated area.

controls.controlText: Protect from sunlight and do not expose to temperatures exceeding 50 C
controls.sourceExcerpt: Protect from sunlight. Do not expose to temperatures exceeding 50 C.

controls.controlText: Cool containers exposed to fire with water spray from a safe distance
controls.sourceExcerpt: Cool containers exposed to fire with water spray from a safe distance.
